steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The subject is 'behavioral scientists such as Gino,' a plural noun phrase. The blank verb must agree with a plural subject in present tense.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — contend: plural present tense, correctly agrees with the plural subject 'behavioral scientists.' ✓
  • Choice B — is contending: singular verb, violates subject-verb agreement with the plural subject. ✗
  • Choice C — has contended: singular verb in present perfect, disagrees with the plural subject. ✗
  • Choice D — contends: singular present tense, violates agreement with the plural subject. ✗
That matches Choice A — contend.
